description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named check-all-parts that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has multiple jobs: python-scripts which runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest, checking ASCII in filenames, case in image filenames, and running various Python scripts; golang-scripts which runs on ubuntu-latest, installing Go and fzp tool; check_modified_files_pull_request and check_modified_files_default which run on ubuntu-latest, checking changed files and running fzp checker; and checker_unit_test which runs on ubuntu-latest, running pytest.
